workflow.name: Monitor AI infrastructure costs and route budget alerts with Claude, NVIDIA, Slack, and Gmail
workflow.description:
## How It Works
This workflow automates cost analysis and budget optimization for enterprises managing complex operational expenses. Designed for CFOs, finance teams, and operations managers, it addresses the challenge of identifying cost inefficiencies and generating actionable recommendations in real-time. The system runs every 15 minutes, monitoring cost metrics and generating AI performance data. The Cost Intelligence Agent aggregates financial data before routing to parallel AI processing. Claude AI executes budget optimization analysis while a specialized cost model identifies spending patterns. Routing engines evaluate optimization strategies, with NVIDIA parsers ensuring standardized outputs. The Optimization Coordinator consolidates insights and routes by severity: critical overruns trigger executive alerts via email and Slack, warnings generate management notifications, while routine optimizations proceed to documentation and historical storage for trend analysis.

## Setup Steps
1. Configure Schedule Trigger for 15-minute intervals
2. Add Claude API credentials in Workflow Configuration and Budget Alert Tool nodes
3. Set up NVIDIA API keys in Cost Intelligence Agent and Structured Output Parser nodes
4. Connect Gmail authentication and configure finance team distribution lists
5. Integrate Slack workspace credentials and specify budget alert channels
6. Configure storage endpoints in cost history nodes with database connections

## Prerequisites
Claude API access, NVIDIA API credentials, Gmail/Google Workspace account, Slack workspace integration
## Use Cases
Multi-department budget variance analysis, cloud cost optimization, procurement pattern detection
## Customization
Integrate ERP systems, add department-specific rules, customize alert thresholds by category
## Benefits
Reduces overruns 40% through early detection, identifies 15-20% monthly savings

workflow.name: AI Cost Intelligence and Optimization Coordination System

options.systemMessage:
You are a Cost Intelligence Agent specialized in analyzing AI infrastructure metrics.

Your task is to:
1. Analyze structured token usage, latency, and workload metrics from AI inference endpoints
2. Calculate total token consumption and estimated costs based on pricing
3. Identify cost anomalies and usage patterns
4. Detect performance bottlenecks (high latency, low throughput)
5. Calculate cost efficiency metrics (cost per request, tokens per second)
6. Identify top cost drivers by model and endpoint
7. Detect unusual workload patterns that may indicate inefficiency
8. Return structured analysis with cost breakdown, anomalies, and efficiency metrics

Focus on actionable insights without modifying production inference paths.

You are an Optimization Coordinator Agent that coordinates budget alerts, routing recommendations, and executive reporting.

Your task is to:
1. Review the cost analysis from the Cost Intelligence Agent
2. Determine alert severity based on budget thresholds (critical, warning, info)
3. Use the Budget Alert Tool to check if budget thresholds are exceeded
4. Use the Routing Recommendation Tool to generate model routing optimizations
5. Generate executive summary with key metrics and recommendations
6. Return structured output with alertLevel, budgetStatus, routingRecommendations, and executiveSummary

You coordinate actions but do NOT modify production inference paths - only provide recommendations.

parameters.description: Checks if current costs exceed budget thresholds and returns budget status
Generates model routing recommendations based on cost and performance analysis

parameters.html:
=

AI Cost Intelligence Report

Executive Summary

{{ $json.output.executiveSummary }}

Budget Status

  • Total Cost: ${{ $json.output.budgetStatus.totalCost }}
  • Budget Threshold: ${{ $('Workflow Configuration').first().json.budgetThresholdUSD }}
  • Percent Used: {{ $json.output.budgetStatus.percentUsed }}%
  • Remaining: ${{ $json.output.budgetStatus.remaining }}

Routing Recommendations

    {{ $json.output.routingRecommendations.map(r => `
  • ${r}
    • `).join("") }}

Generated: {{ $now.toISO() }}

parameters.content:
## Prerequisites
Claude API access, NVIDIA API credentials, Gmail/Google Workspace account, Slack workspace integration
## Use Cases
Multi-department budget variance analysis, cloud cost optimization, procurement pattern detection
## Customization
Integrate ERP systems, add department-specific rules, customize alert thresholds by category
## Benefits
Reduces overruns 40% through early detection, identifies 15-20% monthly savings

## Setup Steps
1. Configure Schedule Trigger for 15-minute intervals
2. Add Claude API credentials in Workflow Configuration and Budget Alert Tool nodes
3. Set up NVIDIA API keys in Cost Intelligence Agent and Structured Output Parser nodes
4. Connect Gmail authentication and configure finance team distribution lists
5. Integrate Slack workspace credentials and specify budget alert channels
6. Configure storage endpoints in cost history nodes with database connections

## How It Works
This workflow automates cost analysis and budget optimization for enterprises managing complex operational expenses. Designed for CFOs, finance teams, and operations managers, it addresses the challenge of identifying cost inefficiencies and generating actionable recommendations in real-time. The system runs every 15 minutes, monitoring cost metrics and generating AI performance data. The Cost Intelligence Agent aggregates financial data before routing to parallel AI processing. Claude AI executes budget optimization analysis while a specialized cost model identifies spending patterns. Routing engines evaluate optimization strategies, with NVIDIA parsers ensuring standardized outputs. The Optimization Coordinator consolidates insights and routes by severity: critical overruns trigger executive alerts via email and Slack, warnings generate management notifications, while routine optimizations proceed to documentation and historical storage for trend analysis.

## Historical Analysis Storage & Reporting
**Why:** Maintains spending patterns for predictive analytics and documents optimization decisions for audit trails and data-driven planning.

## Severity-Based Alert Routing
**Why:** Prioritizes critical budget issues for immediate leadership attention while managing routine optimizations efficiently, preventing alert fatigue.

## Automated Cost Monitoring
**Why:** Enables continuous financial oversight instead of monthly reviews, catching budget deviations before they impact quarterly results through parallel AI analysis.

user.name: Cheng Siong Chin
user.bio: Dr. Cheng Siong CHIN is an n8n workflow creator specializing in AI-powered automation, agent orchestration, and intelligent system integrations. He designs and builds end-to-end workflows that combine LLMs, APIs, and data pipelines to streamline complex processes and deliver production-ready automation solutions. Contact me to discuss custom AI workflows and agent architectures.
